summary: Get one coordination issue viewpoint (Model Manager or legacy BimViewpoint, REST v2.0)
description:
Resolves a join row on this issue: **`viewpoint_uuid`** match first, else legacy **`bim_viewpoint_id`**.

- **MM-backed:** Model Manager `GET .../bim/viewpoints/{uuid}`; **`data`** is the MM viewpoint with
  **`primary`** and **`position`** merged from the join row (same idea as **PATCH** `200`).
- **Legacy:** `BimViewpointBlueprint` view `:procore_v0_1` for the linked `BimViewpoint`, plus **`primary`** /
  **`position`** from the join row.

parameters.name: viewpoint_id
parameters.description:
**MM-backed:** Model Manager viewpoint UUID (`[0-9a-f-]{36}`, case-insensitive). **Legacy:** numeric
`bim_viewpoints.id` for a join row that has `bim_viewpoint_id` (no `viewpoint_uuid`).

parameters.name: included
parameters.description: **Ignored.** Legacy show always returns the full `BimViewpointBlueprint` `:procore_v0_1` payload.

404.description: Mapping not found on issue, coordination issue not found, or MM returned 404
